title: Subscription List
description: A Vibes Platform subscription list containing opted-in mobile subscribers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subscription list.

name.description: Display name of the subscription list.

description.description: Optional description of the subscription list.

subscriber_count.description: Number of active opted-in subscribers in the list.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the subscription list was created.

examples.name: Marketing SMS Subscribers
examples.description: Opted-in subscribers for promotional SMS campaigns.
